About

Top tech service in the tristate
Our Mission

Quality, reliability, exceptional service.

The ZANO promise

ZANO HVAC/R & Plumbing is dedicated to providing exceptional HVAC, refrigeration, and plumbing services to our valued customers. Our mission is to deliver high-quality, reliable, and efficient solutions while ensuring exceptional customer service every step of the way.

We don't just install equipment and walk away. We document, we train, and we stand behind the work. That's how we've earned the trust of homeowners and businesses across the tristate area.

What we believe

Craft over shortcuts Every install, every repair, done the right way
Accountability matters If we did it, we own it — and we fix it
Honest pricing No surprises. No upsells. Clear quotes.
Show up on time Your time is worth as much as ours

Vision

Our Vision

The most trusted name
in the tristate.

We envision becoming the most trusted and sought-after HVAC/R and plumbing service provider in the tristate area, setting the standard for excellence in the industry.

Get in touch

Become a customer Create an account in under a minute
